semantic_matched_intents.quote: Test your changes - Build and test on appropriate platforms
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already tests incrementally by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Documentation rules (D100-D107) - docstrings not required
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids multi-paragraph docstrings and multi-line comment blocks by default, and generally does not write docs unless explicitly asked. This instruction reinforces that docstrings are not required.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Use existing utilities and shared modules when possible
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already prefers editing existing files over creating new ones, and does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires, which implies using existing utilities when possible.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: No premature features. Do not build things nobody is using yet unless they are foundational patterns that every app page will need.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Before undertaking any task or planning any approach, decompose first. Do not jump to implementation. Break the problem into its atomic concerns before deciding how to solve it.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already decomposes non-trivial tasks and plans its approach before implementation by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Abstractions: no new wrappers/types/hooks unless requested.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 1. Show a brief issue list and exact patch plan before edits.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans its approach before implementation and states its action briefly before the first tool call by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 2. Apply the smallest patch that solves the requested problem.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires and prefers editing existing files by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 4. If blocked, stop and ask; do not branch into redesigns.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans its approach before implementation and does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 5. Report exact files changed and validation output.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers and short updates at key moments by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 2. Propose minimal patch plan.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans its approach before implementation and states its action briefly before the first tool call by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 4. Implement approved patch only.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 5. Report results.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers and short updates at key moments by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: New abstraction appears required but unrequested.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Before writing new code (especially non-trivial tasks): 1. Find `2-3` similar modules. 2. Extract concrete local patterns (types, access, validation, errors, permissions). 3. Confirm pattern choice with user when uncertain/high-impact. 4. Then implement.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans its approach before implementation on non-trivial work by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Reuse existing utilities/types before introducing new ones.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already prefers editing existing files and does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Put deep analysis/reports in `/tmp/AI_WORKSPACE/` to keep chat concise.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers and does not narrate internal deliberation by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 1. Confirm pattern in nearby modules.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans its approach before implementation on non-trivial work by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 2. Implement minimal fix with existing utilities/types.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires and prefers editing existing files by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 6. Summarize exactly what changed and why.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers and short updates at key moments by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Read the full current skill before editing
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state before deleting or overwriting by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Never: obvious comments
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes comments only when the WHY is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: DO recreate prior-session incomplete tasks with TaskCreate at the start of each new session and mark the current one in_progress before the first Bash/Edit/Write call.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already decomposes non-trivial tasks and tracks progress using TaskCreate, and marks tasks complete as soon as done. This instruction reinforces the explicit management of task state, which is part of its default task management.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Recreate and mark them completed (or in_progress) explicitly before any tool calls.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already decomposes non-trivial tasks and tracks progress using TaskCreate, and marks tasks complete as soon as done. This instruction reinforces the explicit management of task state, which is part of its default task management.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Default to no comments - clear code and good names are better
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not explain WHAT the code does with comments, preferring clear code and good names.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Avoid comments that restate the code - they become stale
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not explain WHAT the code does with comments.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Complex algorithms or non-obvious "gotchas"
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already only writes a comment when the WHY is non-obvious.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Avoid obvious branching comments - `if (x)` rarely needs `// when x is true`
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not explain WHAT the code does with comments.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Title: imperative mood, lowercase after colon, no period
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already uses imperative-mood summary for commit messages.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Keep bodies concise (1-2 lines typical, trivial changes need only a title)
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes 1–2 sentences for commit message summaries.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: The "why": motivation, design choices, preparation for future work
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already focuses commit messages on WHY not WHAT.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: comments explain why, not what
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes why-not-what comments by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Purpose: Brief explanation of why this change is needed.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes why-not-what commit messages by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Avoid repo-wide formatting/unrelated refactors.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.
